summary: Completed end-to-end testing of Occium application. Fixed critical frontend build error and tested both backend APIs and frontend UI. Backend has significant timeout issues with database/AI operations, but basic endpoints work. Frontend now loads correctly after fixing import path.

critical_bugs.impact: Cannot create posts, core functionality broken
Cannot retrieve posts, core functionality broken

ui_bugs.issue: Button click does not redirect to Google OAuth

integration_issues.issue: Google login integration not triggering OAuth flow

issues: Page title shows 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of 'Occium'

passed_tests: Google Sign In button present and clickable
UI design and styling working correctly
success_percentage: Backend: 40% (2/5 endpoints working), Frontend: 80% (UI loads but auth integration broken)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix backend timeout issues - likely MongoDB connection problems or Gemini API integration issues. 3 out of 5 core endpoints are timing out. Also fix Google OAuth integration in frontend - button clicks not triggering auth flow.
